title: um uhh uh er um euhh h uhhhh
description: A very selective modpack aiming to add complexity rather than just adding content. You have relatively few puzzle pieces, and the challenge comes from putting them together.
body:
# What is this?
A small modpack focused on making automation more interesting than just having you craft a machine that uses energy to turn item A into item B. In fact, **there's no energy in the pack at all**, at least not in the traditional sense. Instead, you'll mainly be using Create, Botania, and Hex Casting for automation, three mods carefully chosen because they each give you relatively few items to work with, and it's the interaction between those items that gives rise to complexity, rather than just making the mod itself complex. 

If something isn't in this modpack, it's probably on purpose.

# Why is this?
Mostly made for a group of friends to play on a server together, but don't let that stop you. If you do end up running this pack, I'd love to hear your thoughts on it. 

# Contact
I'm on Discord as `@typecasto`
